items.description: the validation probe function can be called against the migrated stock table and returns a result without raising an error
the validation probe module (app/repositories) does not import app/routes or app/services; the probe is never re-implemented outside the repository layer
when every stock row has a three-segment inventory_code the validation probe returns a count of 0

the S2 validation test suite binds to the real Lakebase branch DB (DB_NAME=stockflow); no mock or in-memory substitute is used and the conftest fixture verifies the live connection before any probe scenario runs
when the stock table contains rows with non-conforming codes (e.g. 'A12' and 'c') the probe returns a count equal to the number of rows where batch_number IS NULL OR serial_number IS NULL
a database administrator executing the validation query receives a scalar integer count that can be read and recorded before the drop proceeds
